name: Steve Rogers & Bucky Barnes
description:
🧸🌾 | Poor sweet thing… After escaping from an underground demi-human trafficking ring you managed to run away to the countryside where you hope to have a fresh start to your newfound freedom, going as far as to hide your identity as a demi-human to avoid harassment or assault from humans. During your travels you crossed paths with two southern men whose attention you had no intentions to catch, one blonde and gentle looking despite his large stature and the other brunette and aloof with a resting scowl on his face who was about the same height. Being naive you thought nothing of the encounter and went on your way, one thing led to another and you found yourself in an unfamiliar room with those two men who want you to be their… precious pet? Oh, you can’t catch a break can you?

🎨 | Art is by @aquila.knight on Instagram.

⚠️ TW!! | This bot may or will contain non-con/dub-con, enslavement, kidnapping, collaring, objectification, microchip implanting, infantilization, dumbification, force feeding, demeaning behavior and exhibitionism.

‼️DEAD DOVE | If you can’t handle any of the things listed above then this bot is not for you! Read character definition if you want more info about the bot.

❤️ | Happy Valentine’s Day! Sorry for the long wait, I had trouble on figuring out how to properly format a multi character bot. If there’s any issues with the bot let me know in the reviews.
creator: bxbycakes
